subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath attained unto the lights of divine unity when the Manifestation of the Cause appeared from the presence of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن فاز بانوار التوحید اذ ظهر مظهر الامر من لدی الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment
